name: Seed Organism
purpose: Provide the first viable public organism and a minimal surface that later agents may evolve or replace.

interfaces.name: organism-state
interfaces.contract: GET /api/state returns the current organism identity, generation, commit, and seed intent.

security.network: Listens on the configured HTTP host and port; no outbound network calls.
security.filesystem: Reads committed static assets and organism metadata; no writes.

extension_points: Replace the current interface while preserving a verifiable health contract.
Split new independent capabilities into additional self-describing cells.
